title: Create: PROPERLY
description: A Create Mod 6 minimalist modpack, with everything necessary such as QOL and Optimization Mods. Nothing less, nothing more, just proper!
body:
Create: PROPERLY

A Create Mod 6 minimalist modpack, with everything necessary such as QOL and Optimization Mods. Nothing less, nothing more, just proper! ## Why? Because modpacks should've been PROPERLY PROPER from the start. This modpack was designed to give you a lightweight, optimized, simple, and PROPER Create Mod experience while improving the gameplay with QOL and some Vanilla+ mods! ## "So what made this modpack special?" - Has Create 6.0.6 with Addons (soon to update to 6.0.8+ if everything is stable) - Has 1.21 features backported - Can run under 2GB allocated RAM! (recommended to use 4GB) - Is heavily optimized - Has less than 100 mods - Has good shader support (Oculus + Colorwheel + CreateBetterFPS) - Can run Fabric Mods (via Sinytra Connector) ## Motivation Viewers from [my YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@TBroz15) asked me with THOUSANDS of comments for the mod's name, how to install it, how to get any Create-themed modpack, and for whatever nonsense. So I made a dedicated modpack to simplify everything and make sure it is stable, simple, and PROPER as much as possible, while adding more aspects to the game. [Click me](https://youtu.be/NehVZeQUyuk), if you would like to see a dumb compilation of people asking for "mod name" ###### mod name? ## "I want to make a modpack like this one!" Good news! This modpack is [open-sourced](https://github.com/TBroz15/Create-PROPERLY) and built with [Packwiz](https://packwiz.infra.link/), meaning you can tweak, remix, create, and publish your own flavor. ## "But wait a minute, is it actually PROPER?" If you say 100% PROPER, of course not, as there is no such thing as a PROPER modpack. It is up to the players like you to pick what's best. But for me, this a good modpack for Create Mod beginners and people with low end devices. ## Credits Original [Create mod](https://github.com/Creators-of-Create/Create) by the Create team. The icon for "Create: PROPERLY" is a full simplified remake of the Create's icon. The icon of "Create: PROPERLY" was made by TuxeBro and is licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0. To view a copy of this license, visit https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/
